message:
perf(btree): replace Arc<[u16]> cell_pointers with Box<[u16]> — eliminate atomic refcount

StackEntry.cell_pointers was Arc<[u16]>, adding atomic refcount overhead
(~5ns) on every page load and every StackEntry clone. cell_pointers are
never shared across threads — each StackEntry exclusively owns its
pointer array.

Box<[u16]> has the same heap layout but zero atomic operations. For the
common insert-append path, this saves ~5ns per page load (10K loads
for 10K inserts = 50µs).

StackEntry clone (rare cache-hit path) now deep-copies the pointer
array instead of bumping a refcount. This is ~0.4µs for a typical
200-cell page, but the cache-hit path is rare (<1% of loads).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
